name: Low-Fat Corn Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Use part-skim mozzarella and nonfat ricotta.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
3. Spray a 9"x13" baking dish with nonstick vegetable spray.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the mozzarella, corn, ricotta, egg, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
5. Pour about 3/4 cup of sauce into the bottom of the baking dish.
6. Layer half of the noodles over the sauce.
7. Spread half of the cheese mixture evenly over the noodles.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 with remaining sauce, noodles, and cheese mixture.
9. Carefully pour water around the edges of the dish and sprinkle additional mozzarella on top.
10. Tightly cover the pan with foil.
11. Bake in a preheated oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
12. Let the lasagna rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
